meanings.definition: (anatomy) the point of connection between two bones or elements of a skeleton (especially if it allows motion)
the shape or manner in which things come together and a connection is made
a piece of meat roasted or for roasting and of a size for slicing into more than one portion
junction by which parts or objects are joined together
marijuana leaves rolled into a cigarette for smoking

examples: the carpenter jointed two pieces of wood

meanings.definition: affecting or involving two or more
involving both houses of a legislature
